summary: Update mode testing complete. Tested new sensor and Smart RTL API endpoints, verified existing endpoints still work. Updated frontend tests to verify new specs (MATEK 3901-L0X, TF-Luna, Smart RTL) in About section. All 21 backend tests passed (15 existing + 6 new), all 18 frontend tests passed.
seed_data_creation: Test routes created dynamically with TEST_ prefix, cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new sensor and Smart RTL endpoints tested and working. Frontend specs updated to verify MATEK 3901-L0X, TF-Luna, and Smart RTL specs in About section. Documentation list shows 9 documents as expected. 3D drone model renders correctly.

new_backend_tests: test_get_sensor_status - GET /api/sensors/status returns optical flow + LiDAR data
test_get_smart_rtl_config - GET /api/smart-rtl/config returns hybrid nav config

core-flows.spec.ts: App loads with header and navigation
Navigation tabs visible and 3D Map active by default
About section displays project info with new specs (MATEK 3901-L0X, TF-Luna, Smart RTL)
map-simulation.spec.ts: New route button loads new route
Map stats display keyframes and distance
Auto-save toggle is visible and functional
route-history.spec.ts: API: List routes endpoint returns array
API: Save and delete route via API
UI: Enable auto-save and save route
UI: Route History page displays saved routes

sensors.GET /api/sensors/status: Returns optical_flow_connected, optical_flow_quality, flow_x, flow_y, lidar_connected, lidar_distance_m, lidar_signal
sensors.POST /api/sensors/status: Updates sensor status from Raspberry Pi

smart_rtl.GET /api/smart-rtl/status: Returns active, phase, current_altitude, home_distance, return_progress, nav_source, target_altitude
smart_rtl.POST /api/smart-rtl/status: Updates Smart RTL status from Pi
smart_rtl.GET /api/smart-rtl/config: Returns config: high_alt_threshold=50m, precision_land_alt, flow_min_quality, visual_min_confidence

mocked_api_note: /api/routes/demo/generate returns static demo route data (not real flight data) - as expected per requirements
